Join the Wealth Club

What is Wealth Club?

A Mentor-Led Gold Trading Community

Wealth Club is a premium Gold ( ) trading community led by Naveen Yash, founder of Jeta Futures.

Inside the club, Naveen provides trade insights, entries, and clear guidance, helping members understand market structure, risk, and execution through real market experience.

This is not a random signal group, but a guided trading environment built for disciplined and serious traders.

Futures

Who This is For/ Not For

Who This Is For

Traders focused on Gold (XAUUSD)
Traders with basic market experience
Traders seeking structured guidance
Traders aiming for long-term consistency

Who This Is NOT For

Absolute beginners
Shortcut or “get-rich-quick” seekers
Signal-only followers
Traders who ignore risk management
